title: dotHack Music
description: This mod is for the modpack The World R:Craft
body:
![](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/dotHackMusic/BH_NU_HEADER.png)
# What Does This Mod Do? This mod is meant for my modpack [The World R:Craft](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/the-world-r-craft) to help add music to it. It now loads all music into the sound system and adds a disc for audio! This is made to help reduce my modpack size by off loading the sounds to it's own mod.
